name: Patient 15
history: Ongoing workplace difficulties with underappreciation and lack of support. Repeated experiences of ideas not being accepted.
intermediate_belief: Nothing I contribute at work is valued or taken seriously.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm invisible and insignificant in my workplace.
coping_strategies: Continuing to contribute ideas despite rejection, frustration.
situation: Workplace discussion about culture conflicted with client meeting scheduled by mentor.
auto_thought: Once again, my input doesn't matter compared to others' schedules.
behavior: Participate in workplace discussion while feeling undervalued.
